summary: Iteration 31: FULL SYSTEM INTEGRATION - All 5 integration flows verified. Backend 17/17 tests PASSED. Frontend all modules showing populated data correctly.

issues: Session timeout may redirect to venue/home when navigating between Kitchen and Bar tabs - minor UX issue

integration_flow_1_pulse_to_tap.description: POST /api/pulse/guest/intake creates guest, POST /api/pulse/entry/decision with decision=allowed auto-creates tap_session with tab_number. Guest appears in GET /api/pulse/inside AND GET /api/tap/sessions.

integration_flow_2_tap_to_kds.description: POST /api/tap/session/{id}/add with alcohol item (is_alcohol=true) creates KDS ticket at destination=bar. Food item creates ticket at destination=kitchen. Verified via GET /api/kds/tickets.

integration_flow_3_pay_here_tips_to_mana.description: POST /api/tap/session/{id}/close with payment_location=pay_here returns tip_pending=true. POST /api/tap/session/{id}/record-tip stores tip. GET /api/manager/shift-overview shows revenue=$85 and tips=$15. Shift vs Ops shows tips distributed ($3.07 each to 5 staff).

integration_flow_4_table_sessions.description: GET /api/table/tables shows 3 occupied tables (T2=Maria Santos $44, T3=Ricardo Almeida $127, T7=Fernando VIP $352) with real items. Sessions also appear in GET /api/tap/sessions with session_type=table.

integration_flow_5_staff_sync.description: POST /api/manager/staff creates barman, immediately appears in GET /api/staff/barmen. Staff: Carlos Silva, Ana Perez, Marco Rossi, Joao, TEST_StaffSync_* visible in dropdowns and Shift vs Ops.

demo_data_preservation.description: Pulse: 9 guests inside. Tap: 7 open sessions. KDS: 16+ kitchen tickets visible. Tables: 3 occupied (T2, T3, T7). Manager: revenue=$85, tips=$15. Staff: 5 barmen.

frontend_verification.navigation: VERIFIED - Login → Enter Demo Club Updated → Modules dropdown works for all modules
frontend_verification.pulse_module: VERIFIED - 9 guests inside, guest list with tab numbers, Manual Entry button visible
frontend_verification.tap_module: VERIFIED - 7 open tabs with totals ($13-$352), catalog categories, Select barman dropdown
frontend_verification.table_module: VERIFIED - 8 tables grid, 3 occupied (T2, T3, T7) with guest names and server names
frontend_verification.kitchen_kds: VERIFIED - 16 pending tickets, status columns (Pending/Preparing/Ready/Delivered/Delayed), Start Preparing buttons
frontend_verification.manager_dashboard: VERIFIED - Overview: Revenue $85, Open Tabs 7 ($639 running), Tabs Closed 3, Top 10 Items, Guest Funnel (9→9→10→3)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31: ALL 5 INTEGRATION FLOWS VERIFIED WORKING. (1) Pulse→Tap: entry decision auto-creates tap_session. (2) Tap→KDS: add-item auto-routes to bar/kitchen via _auto_route_to_kds. (3) PayHere+Tips→Manager: close with payment_location=pay_here, record-tip stores in meta, shift-overview aggregates tips. (4) Table sessions: appear in both /table/tables and /tap/sessions with session_type=table. (5) Staff sync: /manager/staff writes to venue_barmen, /staff/barmen reads same collection. All modules showing populated demo data. No critical issues found.
